headlines.title: India Condemns Iran Attack on Fujairah as Oil Prices Surge
headlines.summary: India has called for an end to the hostilities in the Middle East, condemning Iran for its recent attack on the port of Fujairah - a vital oil hub that sits right outside the Strait of Hormuz. headlines.title: Big Oil Resists Push To Prioritize Output Growth
headlines.summary: It is profit season again, and Big Oil is raking it in, both in Europe and in the U.S., as soaring oil and gas prices boost earnings. What they are not boosting, however, is production. Big Oil is signaling it has no plans to rearrange its priorities. Higher oil prices drove the

headlines.title: ADNOC Accelerates $55 Billion Investment after UAE’s OPEC Exit
headlines.summary: The Abu Dhabi national oil company, ADNOC, is accelerating investment in growth and production after the United Arab Emirates (UAE) left OPEC on May 1. headlines.summary: A fragile four-week ceasefire between the United States and Iran appears to be on the brink of collapse following a violent exchange of fire in the Persian Gulf on Monday.
